text:
11-28-23; Effective: 01-01-24; Implementation:01-02-24) 

A. Services Included 

The law requires the 30-day period to include all covered home health 
services, including medical supplies, paid on a reasonable cost basis. That 
means the 30-day period payment rate includes costs for the six home 
health disciplines and the costs for routine and nonroutine medical 
supplies. The six home health disciplines included in the 30-day period 
payment rate are: 

1. Skilled nursing services; 

2. Home
